AEL.caption: Document names (comma-separated)
AEL.doc: Comma-separated list of allowed document names. Each name will be trimmed. Example: "my-doc, another-doc"
AEL.name: docNames

AEY.caption: App ID
AEY.doc: Your Tiptap Cloud or custom collab app ID. For Tiptap Cloud, this is included as the 'aud' (audience) claim in the JWT — required for authentication.
AEY.name: appId

sub.caption: User ID (sub)
sub.doc: Optional. A unique identifier for the user (e.g. Current User's unique id). This is included as the 'sub' (subject) claim in the JWT.
sub.name: sub

expiration.caption: Expiration (seconds)
expiration.doc: How long the JWT token is valid, in seconds. Default is 86400 (1 day).
expiration.name: expiration

jwt_secret.caption: Which JWT secret to use
jwt_secret.doc: Key to use to sign the JWT key
jwt_secret.name: jwt_secret
